archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) Touches

brand_identity.name: Floarea
taglines: Floral Art for Life's Most Beautiful Moments
brand_identity.vibe: Premium, organic, high-end editorial, sensory, exclusive.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#1C1B1A]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#1C1B1A]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Frame products like art pieces in a gallery. Heavy use of negative space.
spacing_and_layout.radii: rounded-none or rounded-sm (2px). Luxury brands avoid heavy pill-shapes.
spacing_and_layout.mobile_constraints: Images must not exceed 80vh. Use max-h-[80vh] md:max-h-none.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A2E20] text-white hover:bg-[#2A4531] transition-colors px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-widest uppercase
buttons.secondary: border border-[#1A2E20]/20 bg-transparent text-[#1A2E20] hover:bg-[#F2EFE9] px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-widest uppercase
buttons.icon: p-3 rounded-full bg-[#F2EFE9] hover:bg-white transition-all shadow-sm

cards.product: group cursor-pointer border-none bg-transparent flex flex-col gap-4

components.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#1A2E20]/5
components.mobile_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-[#1A2E20]/5 pb-safe pt-2 px-6 flex justify-between items-center md:hidden

hero_banner.description: High-end luxury red roses in a black box, dimly lit room.
hero_banner.placement: Home page hero section overlay (Must use bg-black/40 to bg-black/50 gradient for text contrast).

category_fresh.description: Elegant pristine white orchids and hydrangeas against beige plaster.

product_sample_1.placement: Best Sellers Product Image / Product Details showcase.

motion.hover: Image slow scale (scale-105 duration-700 ease-out) on product cards and categories. Never scale the container itself, only the inner image.
motion.page_transition: Fade in with slight upward translation (framer-motion).
motion.cart_drawer: Slide in from right, smooth damping.

icons_and_assets.whatsapp_integration: Prominent floating action button or mobile nav icon. Number: +971501311930. Use brand green (#1A2E20) or classic WhatsApp green (#25D366) styled minimally.
icons_and_assets.payment: Paymob integration requires clear visual trust badges (Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay).

specific_functionalities.product_catalog: Categories: Forever Roses, Fresh Flowers, Best Sellers, Special Occasions.
specific_functionalities.product_details: Price MUST be displayed as 'Dhs.'. Accordion for Description, Care Instructions, Delivery Info.
specific_functionalities.checkout_flow: Slide-out cart drawer. Clean, minimal checkout stepping. WebView integration for Paymob.
specific_functionalities.wishlist: Heart icon absolute-positioned on top right of product cards. Micro-animation when toggled.
specific_functionalities.user_auth: Minimalist forms using Shadcn inputs. No heavy shadows.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' fonts from Google Fonts.
Override default Tailwind config with the custom color palette provided above. Map them as 'brand-primary', 'brand-surface', etc.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural creative marketing sections, and deeply customized Shadcn/UI for logic-heavy parts (Select, Accordion, Dialog/Drawer).
For product images, ensure aspect ratio consistency (e.g., aspect-[4/5]) with object-cover.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='whatsapp-contact').
Mimic mobile-native feel for PWA/Web-App: sticky bottom navigation, large tap targets, and safe-area paddings.
Build the bento grid for categories with asymmetry (e.g., one large dominant category card, two smaller stacked ones).
